visionText: To become a strategic platform and talent hub that develops capable Hung Men leaders for Malaysia and the wider international network.
missionBullets: Advance leadership, education, and professional capability across our network.
Connect Hung Men talent, institutional partners, and strategic opportunities.
Cultivate youth leadership, discipline, and an international outlook.
Strengthen capability in research, technology, AI, and industry transformation.
Encourage public service and national contribution in civil and defence domains.
coreValuesText: Loyalty as foundation, wisdom as tool; serve the nation, strengthen the community.

priorities.title: Leadership Development
priorities.description: Build leaders who can guide institutions, communities, and future initiatives with credibility.

priorities.title: Institutional Education
priorities.description: Deliver structured learning that combines heritage, strategy, technology, and practical capability.

priorities.title: Research & Dialogue
priorities.description: Generate informed perspectives that support thoughtful engagement with public and institutional issues.

priorities.title: Service & Partnerships
priorities.description: Align programmes and partnerships with national contribution, community resilience, and long-term impact.
